Chronology of every recorded fact about [[First Elder]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The First Elder requested Lindon's presence to review the events of the day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The First Elder is a leader within the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The First Elder's robes are jade and gold to match the pillars and tiles of the Clan Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The First Elder has very long eyebrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The First Elder stands on the stairs of the Hall of Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The First Elder of the Wei clan lives in a house that is perfect for cultivating White Fox madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The First Elder gave Lindon the book Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The First Elder expected to see Lindon before sunset on the day of the Foundation tournament.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is there to see the First Elder regarding recent earthquakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The First Elder is visiting the Eighth Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The First Elder is an elder of the Wei clan who took a personal interest in Lindon during his first madra test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The First Elder uses the Fox Dream technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon seized the First Elder by the scruff of his neck.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
